author: @SonalDiwanjiMusicInstitute

title: St. Joseph's College, Bangalore vs Christ University | All the Details You Need to Know
body:
I had the same confusion between these 2 colleges for my BBA course. The christ website gave me the required details, and Kavach's videos helped me clear all other queries, but the SJCC one wasn't clear on the admission process. If anyone from SJCC is reading this comment, could you please answer:
a) How is the selection process for BBA? The website states that applicants need to write an exam (SMAT) and then there is an interview later. Is the SMAT exam difficult, and what sort of portions are covered under it? And, does the personal interview require me to be prepared for a micro-presentation, or just basically what do they ask in the personal interviews?
b) How is the crowd at SJCC? Are most of them decent, or are there lots of rowdy types? Does ragging or anything like that take place?

I would be very happy and grateful if someone could answer these questions of mine.
author: @itsnachikethahere

title: St. Joseph's College, Bangalore vs Christ University | All the Details You Need to Know
body: I guess you must also talk about the NAAC rating and the quality of education in these colleges and a little more research on attendance , dress code will add depth to the information. Also..SJC is managed by Jesuits. THERE IS A BIG DIFFERENCE BETWEEN JESUIT EDUCATION AND THE EDUCATION IN NON JESUIT UNIVERSITIES AND COLLEGES.
author: @zacrenu

title: 30 Day Prayer to Saint Joseph | For St Joseph's powerful intercession
body:
Amen . 26th day.
Dear St. Joseph please continue to intercede for me my family my friends and those who are here in this novena and humanity for all our intentions that we are praying for. You are very powerful intercessor because you are close to the Holy Trinity and the Blessed Virgin Mary .You and the blessed Virgin Mary have been interceding for me and thank you . I became the winner of my very difficult and challenging childhood and adulthood circumstances but through the help foremost by Father God Jesus and The Holy Spirit and you and Mama Mary’s prayers and intercessions I was able to overcome all my trials and tribulations .Truly I am the living proof of God’s unconditional love because of my faith and I am the recepient of lot of blessings and miracles by my belief in the power of praying .St . Joseph always intercede for all of us that we all maybe guided to obey God’s commandments and Jesus commandments and teachings and guide us to practice great virtues of kindness humility compassion perseverance sharing giving the act of forgiving respecting our body as the temple of the Holy Spirit and carrying our daily crosses.always ask Father God to send us his Holy Spirit and always ask him to send all of us our guardian angels to protect us light and guard us rule and guide us to our final destination of heaven. Please continue to pray for world peace for the lost souls those with infirmities in the heart body mind and soul for the dying for those who have died and the poor souls in purgatory. Please always pray for the unborn the orphans the oppressed the abused the vulnerable elderly those seeking justice . Always pray for the prayer warriors and please always unite all family .Amen.
author: @salliemae9284

title: 30 Day Prayer to Saint Joseph | For St Joseph's powerful intercession
body: Praying for my son that he will attend mass, continue be a great father to his son. Pray I find a new job that pays more and I would enjoy. St. Joseph pray for us and all of our intentions. Amen
author: @mcddarville5106

title: 30 Day Prayer to Saint Joseph | For St Joseph's powerful intercession
body:
Amen. 24th Day
Dear St . Joseph together with Mama Mary thank you for all your intercessions that you have done for me throughout my life .
Continue to pray for all my personal intentions and my intentions for my brothers and sisters of the world and please continue to intercede for all those who are here . Continue to intercede for the unborn orphans innocent children the vulnerable elderly the abused the oppressed the neglected the abandoned the elderly the lonely and broken hearted those seeking justice
Continue your pray for us that we all
Maybe made worthy of Jesus promises . Continue to pray for the lost souls those who are dying those who have died and the poor souls in purgatory . Continue to pray for all families that they all be together in love till death do they part . Amen.
author: @salliemae9284

title: 30 Day Prayer to Saint Joseph | For St Joseph's powerful intercession
body: Dear St Joseph, I still need My Holy Mary and my Lord Jesus 🙏 and my St Joseph Help and prayers 🙏 and Blessings out here Amen
author: @RamonRecio-we3kn

title: 30 Day Prayer to Saint Joseph | For St Joseph's powerful intercession
body: Amen . 30th day . Please St. Joseph continue to intercede for all of us who are here in this novena . Continue to pray for my personal intentions for me my family my friends those special people who God put on my path as a reason a season  a lesson and lot of blessings and those people who God put on my path not to break me but made me stronger . Together with the Blessed Virgin Mary always pray for us the sinners now and at the hour of our death and that we all may be made worthy of Jesus promises . Ask The Holy Trinity to have mercy on us through the sorrowful passions of Jesus . Guide our steps to righteousness obedience and practice of great virtues . St . Joseph always be the defender and protector of the orphans the children the elderly the oppressed the abused the neglected the abandoned those seeking justice . Pray for world peace please ask Jesus to heal us of our past wounds and healing of our infirmities in the heart body mind and soul. Please pray for the dying the lost souls those who have died and the poor souls in purgatory . Thank you to you and the Blessed Virgin Mary for all the intercessions that you have done to me in my entire life . Amen.
author: @salliemae9284

title: 30 Day Prayer to Saint Joseph | For St Joseph's powerful intercession
body:
Amen. 17th day
Thank you St . Joseph for your intercessions . I was the lost soul who became the biggest sinner. I was the orphan the abused by my own father at age 5 the neglected the abandoned and given away to my late beautiful grandma i was orphaned from my mom who died when I was 4 . Thank you for your intercessions and Mama Mary’ intercession . It was a long journey but I am a survivor of all my childhood and adulthood circumstances . Say thank you to Father God for his unconditional love for me . Say thank you to Jesus for his greatest sacrifice in dying the most painful death to redeem me and pay for my sins . Say thank you to the Holy Spirit for never leaving me . Please St Joseph continue to intercede for me the sinner that I maybe made worthy of Jesus promises . Ask Father God to allow his Holy Spirit to dwell within me to influence my free will to choose the path of righteousness and obedience . Ask Father God to send me his most powerful Holy Angels and my assigned guardian angel to protect me light and guard me against temptations and to rule and guide me to my final destination destination of heaven
St Joseph please continue to intercede for everybody who are present in this novena . Always intercede for the lost souls , the orphans the innocent children , the unborn, the vulnerable elderly those seeking justice those with infirmities in the heart body mind and soul, for world peace especially in the Middle East in The land of Jesus birthplace . Please intercede for the dying those who have died and the poor souls in purgatory . Amen.
author: @salliemae9284

title: 30 Day Prayer to Saint Joseph | For St Joseph's powerful intercession
body:
Amen . Sixth day .
Dear St . Joseph please pray for my eldest daughter that a good patient kind honest loyal and faithful and honorable man may find her and will love her unconditionally .
Please St . Joseph continue to pray for all of us that we may be made worthy of Jesus promises .
And please pray for those with infirmities of the heart body mind and soul and ask Jesus for healing . Amen .
author: @salliemae9284

title: 30 Day Prayer to Saint Joseph | For St Joseph's powerful intercession
body:
Amen. 27th day
Dear St. Joseph thank you so much for your sacrifices in protecting baby Jesus who was sought by his enemies . Thank you for being his protector and the Blessed Mother’s protector .I am so sorry of the pain and sufferings that Jesus went through to save us the sinners . Please ask him for his mercy for all of us sinners. Please St. Joseph and Mama Mary continue to pray for us the sinners till the hour of our death and both of you please pray that we all maybe made worthy of Jesus promises . Please ask the Mercy of Father God and the Holy Spirit and mostly Jesus who shed his most precious blood for us . St. Joseph always ask Father God to send us his Holy Spirit . Please always ask to send us his powerful Holy angels to protect us to guard us and guide us .
Please intercede for all our intentions who are present in this novena . Please pray/ intercede together with the Blessed Mother for conversion of sinners intercede for the lost souls the dying , those with infirmities of the heart body mind and soul and ask Jesus to heal all of us . Please pray for those who have died and the poor souls in purgatory. Intercede for the unborn innocent children vulnerable elderly the abused the oppressed the neglected the abandoned those seeking justice , the prayer warrior please pray for world peace and always unite all families . Amen.
author: @salliemae9284

title: 30 Day Prayer to Saint Joseph | For St Joseph's powerful intercession
body:
Dear Saint Joseph
I Jacqui D
Thank you for being a wonderful Foster Father to me and for answering my prayers and making things possible for me when it seem impossible. Please help me financially open doors for and bring miracles into my life. Let all decisions made against me be overturned and let me receive my compensation from employers and all monies stolen from to be paid back in full and that my pension pot will be rectified in the mighty name of our Lord Jesus Christ Amen and the Immaculate Blessed Virigin Mary Amen 🙏🏾 Thank you Saint Joseph for obtaining all that I asked in prayer. Amen praise God 👏

body: i am greatly devoted to St Joseph He was chosen by God to Protect And provide for Our loving Savior and Our Blessed Lady... His profound Humility And Devotion to His Duty to the event of His death ...Dear St Joseph Pray for us during this time of great danger and in this great crises of the Holy Catholic Church.
author: @merrelgallias3789

title: St Joseph: Our Spiritual Father FULL DOCUMENTARY
body: St Joseph is humble and loving!He reminds me of my father who likely wished for a son but he got a scrawny little girl. He just ignored that and taught me things a son would needed to learn. To help, I had ti know the name of every tool he had to help him work on his Dodge truck. He kept it running daily since It was just after WWII and there were no new trucks to buy! I learned to drive that old truck at age 12! Next he bought me a bike. Like Jesus, I was Needed!”Thanks be to God, For men like St Joseph!
author: @Counselangel13

title: St Joseph: Our Spiritual Father FULL DOCUMENTARY
body: Thank you for this excellent uplifting message of St. Joseph. Catholics like me know the invaluable role he played in the life of Christ and yet little or no attention is payed to St. Joseph. Thanks for waking up my spirit to him. St. Joseph, foster father of my Lord Jesus Christ, and my foster father too, pray for me at this great time of need. Amen
author: @stellaodife9937

title: St Joseph: Our Spiritual Father FULL DOCUMENTARY
body:
That’s what’s exactly missing in our culture: self sacrifice. Our culture has become very self centered. I believe that self sacrifice is the key to a successful marriage, and God will bless such a family.

I pray the litany and a personal prayer to St. Joseph everyday, and I tell him that I love him many times during the day: Jesus, Mary, Joseph , I love you save souls, including my family. It comes from the heart.

I had to write a comment for this video as my daily prayer to St. Joseph. 🙏❤️🌹
author: @margokupelian344
